stages.name: Oil Price Shock
stages.description: Brent crude spikes, WTI follows. Gasoline prices at pump rise within days.

stages.name: Energy Cost Cascade
stages.description: Natural gas prices spike (LNG rerouting). Electricity costs rise. Industrial production slows.

stages.name: Helium & Semiconductor Squeeze
stages.description: Semiconductor fabs reduce output. Lead times extend. Helium spot prices surge.

stages.name: Fertilizer & Food Pressure
stages.description: Urea/ammonia prices spike. Planting disrupted. Food inflation visible.
evidence: PPI: warning — producer input costs rising
Oil shock active → fertilizer cost pressure

stages.name: Pharmaceutical Delays
stages.description: India flags raw material shortages. Generic drug supply chains lengthen.

stages.name: Industrial Slowdown
stages.description: Petrochemical feedstock shortages. Plastics/packaging costs rise. Manufacturing slows.

stages.name: Infrastructure Rebuild
stages.description: Even after ceasefire, Gulf infrastructure requires years to rebuild. LNG/helium supply constrained.
evidence: Long-term structural — always projected until resolution confirmed

stages.name: New Supply Equilibrium
stages.description: Alternative supply chains mature. New plants reach capacity. Markets find new equilibrium.
evidence: Terminal stage — projected until upstream stages resolve
